Organisms are living things

They are [[dynamical systems]] with a [[telos]]. All organisms are moving [[to omega]].

The term normally only is used to refer to ones that emerged from or descend from ones that emerged from [[abiogenesis]]

They include  [[Alearners]] and [[learners]]
[[Category:Organisms]]
[[sn:Organisms]][[Category:Dynamical systems]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Organisms]]==See Also==
* [[Great chain of being]]
[[Category:Pages]]
